节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述:
Indicates the {@code DataType}.

{@code DataType} is obtained based on the value.
Indicates that the data type is null.
Indicates that the data type is long.
Indicates that the data type is double.
Indicates that the data type is byte string.
Indicates that the data type is blob.
Provides methods for accessing a datashare result set generated by querying the database.
Obtains the names of all columns or keys in a result set. The column or key names are returned as a string array, in which the strings are in the same order as the columns or keys in the result set.
Obtains the number of columns or keys in the result set. The returned number is equal to the length of the string array returned by the columnCount method.
Obtains the number of rows in the result set.
Checks whether the current result set is closed. If the result set is closed by calling the close method, true will be returned.
Go to the first row of the result set. returns false otherwise, for example, if the result set is empty.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns true if the result set is moved successfully;
节点.return_description: Returns true if the result set is moved successfully;

节点.功能描述: Go to the last row of the result set. returns false otherwise, for example, if the result set is empty.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns true if the result set is moved successfully;
节点.return_description: Returns true if the result set is moved successfully;

节点.功能描述: Go to the next row of the result set. returns false otherwise, for example, if the result set is already in the last row.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns true if the result set is moved successfully;
节点.return_description: Returns true if the result set is moved successfully;

节点.功能描述: Go to the previous row of the result set. returns false otherwise, for example, if the result set is already in the first row.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns true if the result set is moved successfully;
节点.return_description: Returns true if the result set is moved successfully;

节点.功能描述: Go to the specified row of the result set forwards or backwards by an offset relative to its current position. A positive offset indicates moving backwards, and a negative offset indicates moving forwards. returns false otherwise.
注释信息: @param { number } offset - Indicates the offset relative to the current position.
@returns { boolean } Returns true if the result set is moved successfully and does not go beyond the range;

parameters.说明: Indicates the offset relative to the current position.

节点.return_description: Returns true if the result set is moved successfully and does not go beyond the range;

节点.功能描述: Go to the specified row of the result set.
注释信息: @param { number } position - Indicates the index of the specified row, which starts from 0.
@returns { boolean } Returns true if the result set is moved successfully; returns false otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates the index of the specified row, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: Returns true if the result set is moved successfully; returns false otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the specified column or key in the current row as a byte array. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column or key in the current row is null or the specified column or key is not of the Blob type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.
@returns { Uint8Array } Returns the value of the specified column or key as a byte array.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: Returns the value of the specified column or key as a byte array.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the specified column or key in the current row as string. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column or key in the current row is null or the specified column or key is not of the string type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.
@returns { string } Returns the value of the specified column or key as a string.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: Returns the value of the specified column or key as a string.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the specified column or key in the current row as long. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column or key in the current row is null, the specified column or key is not of the long type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.
@returns { number } Returns the value of the specified column or key as a long.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: Returns the value of the specified column or key as a long.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the specified column or key in the current row as double. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column or key in the current row is null, the specified column or key is not of the double type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.
@returns { number } Returns the value of the specified column or key as a double.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: Returns the value of the specified column or key as a double.

节点.功能描述: Closes the result set. Calling this method on the result set will release all of its resources and makes it ineffective.
Obtains the column index or key index based on the specified column name or key name. The column name or key name is passed as an input parameter.
注释信息: @param { string } columnName - Indicates the name of the specified column or key in the result set.
@returns { number } Returns the index of the specified column or key.

parameters.说明: Indicates the name of the specified column or key in the result set.

节点.return_description: Returns the index of the specified column or key.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the column name or key name based on the specified column index or key index. The column index or key index is passed as an input parameter.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the index of the specified column or key in the result set.
@returns { string } Returns the name of the specified column or key.

parameters.说明: Indicates the index of the specified column or key in the result set.

节点.return_description: Returns the name of the specified column or key.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the dataType of the specified column or key. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column or key in the current row is null, the specified column or key is not in the data type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.
@returns { DataType } Returns the dataType of the specified column or key.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index or key index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: Returns the dataType of the specified column or key.
